settings.subtitle: Centella Asiatica + UV Filters
settings.description: A high-protection sunscreen infused with Centella Asiatica and advanced UV filters to defend your skin while maintaining a clear, hydrated finish.
settings.key_ingredients: SPF 60 PA+++, Centella Asiatica, Niacinamide, Hyaluronic Acid

settings.label: GOOD FOR:
settings.value: All skin types, including sensitive and acne-prone skin

settings.label: FEELS LIKE:
settings.value: A lightweight, breathable layer that blends smoothly

settings.label: LOOKS LIKE:
settings.value: A clear, natural finish with no white cast

settings.label: SMELLS LIKE:
settings.value: Light, clean freshness with a soft finish

settings.title: Protection That Feels Effortless. A daily sunscreen for DEFENSE + HYDRATED, PROTECTED SKIN.
SPF 60 PA+++
settings.description: provides maximum defense against harmful UVA and UVB rays

settings.title: CENTELLA ASIATICA
settings.description: soothes and calms skin while maintaining hydration throughout the day

settings.title: what's inside
settings.intro: Our formula is powered by advanced filters and skin-soothing botanicals. Meet 2 of our favorites for daily protection.
settings.footer_text: also made with NIACINAMIDE, HYALURONIC ACID, VITAMIN E

settings.description: SAID IT LEFT ZERO WHITE CAST ON THEIR SKIN
SAID IT FELT WEIGHTLESS AND BREATHABLE
SAID IT WORKED PERFECTLY AS A MAKEUP PRIMER
SAID THEIR SKIN FELT CALM AND PROTECTED ALL DAY

settings.footnote: Based on a 2-week consumer perception study with consistent daily use.

settings.question: Does it leave a white cast?
settings.answer: No, it is formulated to blend invisibly into all skin tones for a smooth finish.

settings.question: Can I use it under makeup?
settings.answer: Yes, its weightless texture makes it a perfect primer for makeup application.

settings.title: FAQ
settings.subtitle: Everything you need to know about Centella Sunscreen.
